name: Add a line item to a draft already on screen
description: User had a draft quote with two lines. Mid-conversation, they realize they forgot a line. The assistant should update the existing draft, not create a new quote.

persona.name: Marcus Lee
persona.context: Drafting a kitchen sink replacement; forgot to include haul-away fee.

preconditions: Active draft quote in the current thread with: 'Sink replacement' $480 and 'Plumbing materials' $120

steps.expect: Assistant uses an update/append-line tool — same quoteId as before
Action card reflects 3 line items totaling $640.00; previous lines still listed
Assistant updates the haul-away line to $50 (in cents 5000), totals reflect $650.00 — still no new quote

evaluationCriteria.check: Updated action cards visually replace the prior card or clearly mark it superseded — no two stale cards stacked
Edits feel conversational; user doesn't need to know the word 'edit'
Backend has one quoteId with three line items, not three quotes
Updated total is announced via aria-live so the change is noticeable without re-scanning
